summary: The diff shows updates to SignatureDishes.tsx and menuData.ts referencing newly generated image paths, and the project state/file summaries describe the images as added. However, the actual image files (the 12 PNG assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/) are not present in the diff as ADDED FILES — the diff explicitly states 'Added: 0'. REQ-2 and REQ-3 code changes are implemented, but REQ-1 (the actual image files) cannot be confirmed from the diff alone. Additionally, some dishes in menuData.ts still use fallback/generic images (IMAGES.dosa, IMAGES.chicken, etc.) rather than dish-specific generated images, meaning not every dish has a unique generated image referenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate AI images for each dish and save them as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the specified filenames.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff reports 'Added: 0' files — none of the 12 required PNG image files (jigarthanda.dim_400x400.png, ice-cream.dim_400x400.png, chettinad-chicken-curry.dim_400x400.png, etc.) appear as added files in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: All dish entries in menuData.ts reference valid image paths pointing to the generated images; no broken image links remain.
missing_requirements.reason: Many dishes in menuData.ts still use generic fallback images (IMAGES.dosa, IMAGES.chicken, IMAGES.bbq) rather than dish-specific generated images. For example, Gobi 65, Baby Corn Pepper Fry, and Onion Pakoda all use IMAGES.dosa. Not every dish has a unique generated image path.
